productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men Solid Blue Tshirts
description: CompositionBlue polo neck t-shirt with black stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed and tipped collar with a velvetty tape inseam, buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, vented hem with velvetty tape inseam and embroidered brand logo on left chestFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately using a mild detergentTumble wash dry in gentle cyclesDo not bleachDry in shadeIron while damp for a crisp feel, but do not iron on print/embellishmentsDesigned for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this striped classic polo t-shirt oozes confidence and great looks. The buttoned chest placket makes it an easy wear, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The ribbed sleeve hems sit snug on well-toned arms, and the vented hem provides a great Fit. Team it with jeans, a classic belt and leather shoes to make it a great Friday wear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
